title: Welcome Bonus
description: 100% match bonus on your first deposit up to the equivalent of $200 USD. Get double your money to start playing.
terms: New players only. First deposit only. Minimum deposit equivalent to $20 USD. 20x wagering on bonus amount. 30-day expiry. Max bet equivalent to $5 USD per spin while bonus is active.

title: Weekend Reload Bonus
description: 50% reload bonus every Saturday and Sunday on deposits of the equivalent of $50 USD or more, up to $100 USD equivalent.
terms: Existing players only. Available on weekends only. Minimum deposit equivalent to $50 USD. 25x wagering on bonus. Slots only. 7-day expiry.

title: March Madness Cashback
description: Get 10% cashback on net losses every week throughout March, up to $150 USD equivalent per week.
terms: All players. Weekly cashback on net losses. Credited every Monday by 07:00 UTC+7. 1x wagering requirement. Minimum net loss equivalent to $10 USD to qualify.

title: 50 Free Spins — Book of Aztec
description: Claim 50 free spins on Book of Aztec with any deposit of $30 USD equivalent or more this week.
terms: Available to all players. Minimum deposit equivalent to $30 USD required. 50 free spins on Book of Aztec. Winnings subject to 30x wagering. 7-day expiry on spins and winnings.

title: VIP Loyalty Cashback
description: Gold, Platinum, and Diamond VIP players receive up to 15% weekly cashback on all activity.
terms: VIP Gold, Platinum, and Diamond players only. Cashback percentage varies by VIP tier. Credited weekly. 1x wagering. No maximum session bet restriction.

title: Champions League Boost
description: Get enhanced odds on selected UEFA Champions League matches every matchday.
terms: One boosted bet per matchday per player. Maximum equivalent to $50 USD at boosted odds. Standard markets only. Winnings credited as cash.

title: Refer a Friend Bonus
description: Refer a friend and both of you receive the equivalent of $30 USD when they make their first deposit of $50 USD equivalent or more.
terms: Existing verified players only. Referred player must be a new customer. Referred player must deposit minimum equivalent to $50 USD. Both players receive equivalent of $30 USD bonus subject to 20x wagering. Maximum 5 referrals per month.

title: High Roller Welcome Package
description: Exclusive 3-part welcome package for high rollers: 50% up to $1,000 USD equivalent on first three deposits.
terms: New players with minimum deposit equivalent to $200 USD. Three-part package applied to first three deposits. 15x wagering on bonus amount. 45-day expiry. Must opt in before first deposit.
